sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for this tactical RPG

special_mechanics.name: Tactical Battle System
special_mechanics.description: Turn-based tactical RPG combat with up to 5 active participants in combat, 1 reserve, and 1 tactician. Not action-based platformer mechanics.

special_mechanics.name: All-Out Auto-Battle
special_mechanics.description: Computer AI controls battle at extremely fast rate for easier encounters. Speeds up gameplay without tactical advantages.

tier_notes: Tier 3 empirical/qualitative data. This is a tactical turn-based RPG, not an action platformer. No movement physics, gravity, or jump mechanics are documented or applicable to gameplay. Player movement occurs on overworld maps during exploration phases, but specific physics parameters are not documented in available sources.
